message:
fix: atomic lock writes and checked Close() in file copy

lock/lock.go: write lock to temp file then os.Rename() atomically,
preventing partial/corrupt lock files on process crash.

rig/overlay.go: explicitly close destination file and check error
instead of defer, catching full-disk errors that surface at Close().

Closes gt-qrm6y, gt-9q4dp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
